articles.title: 2026년 6월 물리·정보보안 기업 어떤 인재 찾고 있나
articles.description: 보안 기업들의 분야별 인재 채용 동향 정리[보안뉴스 엄호식 기자] 6월, 초여름의 햇살이 본격적으로 기운을 더해가는 시기이며, 특히 올해의 6월은 단순히 계절의 전환점이 아니라, 우리 사회와 국가가 중요한 선택을 마주하는 달이기도 하다. 선거에서 올바른 인재를 뽑아야 국가가 발전하듯, 기업 역시 올바른 인재를 영입해야 성장과 혁신을 이어갈 수 있다. 선거와
articles.summary: 2026년 6월에 기술·보안 업체들이 핵심 인재를 찾고 있는 궤지 물리적 상황을 정리한다.
points: 2026년 6월에 기술·보안 업체들이 인재를 찾고 있다.
이러한 선수들은 국가의 큰 시간을 활용하여 기술·보안에서 많은 가천주를 얻어야 한다.
개인들과 직업군의 합리한 선수들이 중요한 인재를 뽑아야 할 것으로 예상된다.
articles.insight: 2026년 6월의 시기에는 선수들이 국가보안에서 중요한 인재를 뽑아야만 하고, 그리고 개인과 직업군의 모든 부위를 통합시켜야 한다.

articles.title: 개인정보 포함 데이터, 공익 목적 AI 학습에 활용한다... 첫 데이터 관계장관회의 개최
articles.description: ‘데이터 관계장관 회의체’ 신설... 데이터 정책 범부처 총괄데이터 활용 촉진 위한 범부처 데이터 정책 추진[보안뉴스 한세희 기자] 개인정보가 포함된 데이터를 공익 목적의 AI 학습에 활용할 수 있게 법이 개정된다. 보건의료 분야에서 가명 처리 절차도 간소화된다. 28일 김민석 국무총리 주재로 정부서울청사에서 열린 데이터관계장관회의에서 정부는 AI 핵심 전
articles.summary: 국무총리 김민석이 정부의 개정된 법안을 통해 AI를 사용하여 인질성을 방지하는 데이터 활용에 대한 논쟁
points: 국무총리 김민석이 정부서울청사에서 개선된 법안을 제한하여 AI를 사용할 수 있도록
AI를 이용하여 인질성을 방지하기 위해 개인정보를 포함한 데이터관리에 대한 국무총리의 강구니
보건 분야에서의 가명 처리 절차는 현재의 범부처 작업을 개선하여 기존 방식으로 계속
articles.insight: 이러한 법안은 AI를 활용하여 인질성을 방지하는 데이터 활용에 대한 정보처리 기술의 개선으로서, 보건 분야에서만 적용되는 가werb침을 방지할 수 있는 최소한의 방향성을 제공한다.

articles.title: ‘취약점의 산업화’ 가속... “천재 공격자 한명이 다 하는 시대 아냐”
articles.description: 취약점 상품화하는 ‘생태계’ 형성 가속“결합하면 큰 위협... 기존 취약점도 재평가 필요”[보안뉴스 강현주 기자] “이제는 천재 공격자 한 명이 다 하는 시대가 아닙니다. 공격을 돕는 각종 도구 등 ‘생태계’가 활성화되면서 사이버 공격 ‘산업화’ 시대가 열렸으며, AI는 그 효율을 크게 높입니다.”28일 김영표 포티넷코리아 이사는 서울 대치동 포티넷코리아에
articles.summary: 기사는 공격자가 시대를 통과하는 현상으로, AI가 이전보다 더 효율적으로 공격을 수행할 수 0r possibility of a 'new age' where each individual hacker contributes to the cyberattack, as opposed to there being a single legendary hacker dominating in earlier times. This shift is attributed to AI optimization enhancing attack efficiency.
points: 공게사인은 공격자들이 시대와 함께하고 있다는 말
AI의 도구등이 공격을 효과적으로 수행하기 위해서
이전에 전형적인 공격자가 일시적으로 있다는 말
articles.insight: 이 기사는 IT/기술 업체에서의 공격자의 역할과 진정적인 AI가 이제 공격의 효과율을 향상시켜준 사건을 요약한다.

articles.title: Vertu wants CEOs to run companies from an AI foldable starting at $6,880
articles.description: Built on top of the open-source Hermes project, Vertu's new foldable combines AI-agent workflows, enterprise integrations, and ultra-premium luxury finishes.
articles.summary: Vertu has launched a high-end, AI foldable device that combines cutting-edge technology with luxury design.
points: The Vertu model integrates an open-source Hermes project to create a unique blend of AI and enterprise capabilities in a premium smartphone form factor.
Vertu'selled their device at $6,880 with luxurious finishings that cater specifically for tech CEOs who desire top-tier functionality alongside opulence.
This product highlights the market potential and consumer interest in AI technologies within a high-end context.
articles.insight: The Vertu foldable represents an emerging niche for luxury smartphones that integrate advanced enterprise software with personalized, opulent design catering to CEOs. It showcases the convergence of technology and lifestyle among corporate elites.

articles.title: 한싹, 통합보안 모델 공개... “AI·N2SF 전환 한번에 싹”
articles.description: AI·클라우드·제로 트러스트 대응 4대 방향 제시 및 신제품 6종 소개인콤·HS시큐리티와 그룹 시너지로 ‘운영 가능한 통합보안 체계’ 완성[보안뉴스 강현주 기자] 한싹(대표 이주도)이 AI·국가망보안체계(N2SF) 전환 시대를 정조준한 ‘통합보안 모델’을 앞세워 시장 주도권 확보에 나섰다. 컨설팅부터 인프라 구축, 솔루션 도입, 운영 관리까지 보안 전 과정
articles.summary: AI·클라우드·제로 트러스트 대응 방식의 통합보안 모델이 ‘N2SF’ 전환 시대를 선명하게 나타내고 확보한다.
points: AI·공개한 ‘운영 가능한 통합보안 체계’에서 사용할 수 static이 'N2SF'
4대방향으로 진동하여 보안성을 강화한다.
인공지능, 노이콘제공, 리모더화, 그리고 스위칟받기로 통합보안 체계를 구성한다.
articles.insight: N2SF 전환 시대에서 IT/기술 업체는 AI·모델을 통해 보안을 강화하여, 감마운드된 공식적인 보안 전용 시스템을 구성한다.

27일 한때 크롬 브라우저에서 토스증권 웹사이트를 연 뒤 북마크(즐겨찾기) 등록을 시도하면 섬네일로 이재명 대통령의 합성사진이 올라오는 오류가 생겼다

articles.title: 정부24 포털에서 개인정보 유출... 행안부 과징금 2억7300만원
articles.description: 개인정보위, 행정안전부, 농촌친흥청 등에 과징금[보안뉴스 한세희 기자] 민원 포털 정부24를 운영하며 시스템 관리를 소홀히 해 개인정보 유출 사고가 난 행정안전부가 2억7300만원의 과징금을 물게 됐다. 농촌진흥청 및 소속 기관 2곳 등도 개인정보보 보호법 위반으로 과징금 처분을 받았다. 개인정보보호위원회(위원장 송경희)는 전체회의에서 개인정보보호법을 위반

articles.title: 화이트해커, 처벌 걱정 없이 취약점 찾는다... 보안 취약점 상시신고 시범사업 실시
articles.description: 실제 운영 망 취약점 실전 탐색, 조치 후 공개통신·게임·금융 핀테크 등 국민 생활 밀접 기업, 공공 기관 보안 선제 점검[보안뉴스 한세희 기자] 화이트해커가 처벌 받을 걱정 없이 기업이나 기관의 보안 취약점을 찾을 수 있게 된다.국가인공지능전략위원회와 과학기술정보통신부, 국가정보원, 한국인터넷진흥원(KISA)은 ‘보안 취약점 신고·조치·공개(CVD/VD
articles.summary: 화이트해커가 국내에서 기계학습 방식을 사용한 보안 취약점 조사를 시범하고, 크롤링 및 기술을 이용해 보안 취약점에 대한 신호와 덩치가 지원하였다.
points: - 화이트해커는 실제 운영 망의 취약점을 탐색하기 시있는 국가인공지능전략위원회와 함께 보안 취약점 조사를 진행한다.
- 화이트해커는 크롤링과 기술을 활용한 보안 관련 정보를 수집하여 취약점에 대해 덩치가 주로 전체적인 보안 관제와 회사의 보안 방식을 포함한다.
- KRISHIN, CVD/VD와 연계된 공개 참조 시스템이 국민에게 보안 취약점을 전적적으로 관리한다.
articles.insight: 화이트해커의 시범과 연구실은 국민의 보안에 영향을 미치기 위해 필요로 하는 다양한 보안 방식을 조사하고, CVD/VD를 이용한 공개 시스템이 국민 생활의 보안에 대한 변화에 맞는 방식으로 반영한다.

articles.title: 산업재해 취약 중소사업장 안전 위한 기술개발 사업 공고
articles.description: 디지털 기반 중소사업장 산재예방 기술개발 사업 공고중소사업장 맞춤형 산재예방 기술개발 및 실증에 과제당 2년간 최대 6억6000만원 지원기존 제조업 한정에서 건설업 포함 전 업종 지원 범위 확대[보안뉴스 강초희 기자] 중소벤처기업부(장관 한성숙)는 50인 미만 등 중소사업장의 산업재해 예방을 위한 ‘디지털 기반 중소사업장 산재예방 기술개발사업’ 지원과제 모
articles.summary: 중소사업장의 산재예방을 위한 기술개발 공고
points: 2년간에 6억60ty가지로 최대로 지원
제조업과 건설업 포함
articles.insight: 이 공고는 중소기업에서의 산재예방으로 디지털화된 응용 가능성을 제공하는 IT/기술 공고이다.

articles.title: “리투아니아 정부 등록망 뚫렸다” 개인정보·부동산 기록 60만건 유출

articles.title: [속담으로 배우는 100가지 보안 습관-23] 호미로 막을 것을 가래로 막는다(3)-클라우드 동기화 방치하면 생기는 문제
articles.description: 클라우드 자동 동기화 항목을 주기적으로 점검하세요보안 사고의 90%는 해킹이 아니라 ‘실수’에서 시작된다. 그래서 우리는 기술보다 습관을 배워야 한다. 속담으로 배우는 100가지 보안 습관에서는 △스마트폰 보안 △계정·비밀번호 △PC·인터넷 △생활 보안 △금융·개인정보 등 100가지 보안 습관을 속담과 연관시켜 소개한다. 보안은 어렵지 않다. 지키느냐, 안
articles.summary: 보안문제가 '실수'에서 시작되며, IT/기술로 해결할 수 0에 없다는 뜻이다.
points: 보안문제가 '실수'에서 시작되며, IT/기술로 해결할 수 없다는 뜻이다.
'생성'과 '사용'을 구별한 보안 습관들이 중요하다.
기술에 의존하지 마시고 속담으로 알래즈으로 바랐다.
articles.insight: 보안문제는 사용자의 것적인 관대한 기술에 의존하지 마시고 보안심화를 통해 알래즈로 바랍니다.

articles.title: 오픈소스 플랫폼 ‘기티’ 보안 결함 발생... 글로벌 제조·의료 인프라 ‘비상’
articles.description: 4년간 잠재된 기티 취약점, 인증 없이 데이터 무단 탈취 가능... 3만개 시스템 비상[보안뉴스 김형근 기자] 오픈소스 소스코드 관리 플랫폼 ‘기티(Gitea)’에서 인증되지 않은 공격자가 사설 컨테이너 이미지를 무단 탈취할 수 있는 심각한 보안 결함이 발견됐다.이 취약점 ‘CVE-2026-27771’은 별도 자격 증명 없이도 외부 침입자가 비공개 저장소에
articles.summary: 기티(Gitea) 사용자가 공격자로 인증을 빨리 듣지 않아 데이터를 무단탈취하는 보안 위기와 '비상'로 예전에도 있듯이 긁속한 IT/기술 공정에 대한 문제를 고민할 여지
points: 인증을 빨리 받지 않은 공격자가 사설 이미지를 무단탈취하여 인증을 얻을 수 있는 'CVE-2026-27771'
사용자가 공격자로 데이터를 무단탈취하여 인증을 빨리 받을 수 있는 사설 추적기 개선이 요구되어 보안 강화가 필요함
글로벌 IT/기술 공정에서는 이러한 취약점을 활용해 개인정보나 회사의 장점을 획득하기 어려움
articles.insight: 이러한 문제는 IT/기술 공정에서 우順이 아니라 상대방이 '비상'로 탈출하여 긍정적인 모습을 나타내는 일이 있다.

articles.title: [김정덕의 인간중심보안-7] 디지털 야누스, 두 얼굴의 사용자
articles.description: 인간 중심 접근으로 모순을 설득하는 실천 방안[연재목차 Part 3. 인간중심보안과 보안문화]1. AI 시대, 왜 인간 중심 보안인가2. AI 시대, 인간 중심 보안을 구현하려면3. 인간의 창의성과 AI 보안4. 보안 위반, 뇌 과학 해법5. 넛지 보안의 힘6. 감정과 비합리성, 보안의 숨은 힘7. 디지털 야누스, 두얼굴의 사용자8. 인간 중심 보안과 제로
articles.summary: 기사는 AI 시대의 인간 중심 보안에 대한 여러 주제를 다루어본다. 인간의 창의성과 함께 보안을 위해 AI를 사용하는 방법, 보안 위반으로부터의 스트레잂시스텀, 그리고 인간의 감정과 비합리성에 대한 보안을 고려하는 방안이다.
points: AI 시대가 새로운 방식으로 인간 중심 보안을 위해 사용할 수 0r possibility에 대한 논의이다.
인간의 창의성과 AI를 사용하여 보안을 결합시켜야 한다고 강조했으며, 보호를 위해서는 AI의 활동에 인간의 의도와 동기가 중요하다고 흔었다.
보안을 위한 기술들이 범주되고 있으며, 인간의 감정과 비합리성 등에 대해서도 방식을 제안하였다.
articles.insight: 기사는 IT/기술 업체에서 AI를 사용할 수 있는 좋은 방법이지만, AI의 활동을 인간의 의도와 동기로 조정하여 보안을 더욱 강력하게 할 수 있다는 사실을 강조했다.

articles.title: Google engineer charged with insider trading after making $1.2M on Polymarket
articles.description: According to the complaint, a Google engineer risked over $2.7 million on wagers related to Google's 2025 Year in Search campaign.
articles.summary: A Google engineer is charged with insider trading after profiting an estimated $1.2 million from betting on the success of specific keywords for a future Google event.
points: Google employee allegedly engaged in wagering over upcoming year'in search campaigns
Possible illicit gain close to $1.5 million due to early access and non-public information
Charges could impact Google practices around insider trading policies
articles.insight: This case highlights the need for stringent internal controls within tech companies regarding sensitive, predictive data that might influence employee's personal financial decisions.

articles.title: Why Google’s AI can’t spell Google (or anything else)
articles.description: Google is embarrassing itself, again.
articles.summary: The article humorously highlights the unexpected and consistent spelling mistakes made by Google's AI system.
points: Google has struggled to maintain accuracy in its spell-checking capabilities due to various algorithmic flaws inherent within its AI systems.
Despite significant investments, continuous improvements have not been able to fully rectify these issues, leading Google's technology into a recurring self-defeat scenario.
This persistent inability of the artificial intelligence system has become an internet meme and widely acknowledged by tech enthusiasts.
articles.insight: The spelling mistakes made by Google AI not only reflect challenges within natural language processing (NLP) but also underscore human-computer interactions' importance, emphasizing the need for continual enhancement in technology development to maintain user trust and satisfaction.

articles.title: Rivian will deliver the first R2 SUVs on June 9
articles.description: The company has finally set a date for the first customer deliveries of what CEO RJ Scaringe has said is "maybe the most important thing we’ve launched to date."
articles.summary: Rivian announced June 9 as the delivery date for its first customer-ordered SUVs.
points: CEO RJ Scaringe set a specific launch time
First deliveries of Rivian'in most important vehicle to customers expected on this future day
The announcement is seen as significant progress for the company
articles.insight: This development signifies that Rivian has overcome previous obstacles and can begin customer sales, potentially marking a new era in electric SUV innovation.

articles.title: Triomics nabs $22M to bring oncology-specific AI to cancer centers
articles.description: The Series B round was led by Battery Ventures.
articles.summary: Triomics has secured $22M in funding for its cancer-centric artificial intelligence platform. Backed by notable investors including Nest and Fidelity Investments, the company aims to enhance patient outcomes through AI integration at oncology centers.
points: - Triomics has raised $22M in Series B funding led by Battery Ventures. The investment will support their efforts towards advancing cancer care with the help of artificial intelligence.
- Noteworthy backers such as Nest, Fidelity Investments, and others have invested in Triomics' AI-based platform designed specifically for oncology treatment centers to optimize patient outcomes.
- The funding will facilitate the expansion of Triomics’ capabilities across more cancer centers while developing specialized algorithms that cater directly to individual patients with unique needs.
articles.insight: This development represents a significant investment in AI's potential for personalizing and improving treatment outcomes within oncology, setting an example of how technology can be harnessed to enhance patient care quality across the healthcare industry. The involvement of major tech companies as investors underscores this growing trend.

articles.title: In more good news for Amazon, Snowflake signs $6B deal with AWS for AI CPU chips
articles.description: Snowflake has signed a new, enormous five-year deal with Amazon to secure chips for AI usage. Nvidia is once again being put on notice.
articles.summary: Amazon's cloud services provider Snowflake has signed a $6 billion deal with Amazon Web Services (AWS) to secure chips for AI usage.
points: Snowflake, an SaaS data warehousing company used by big tech firms like Netflix and Twitter have partnered on the chip frontier
The partnership will deliver custom-made chips for Amazon'selig AI computing services at AWS with a $6 billion deal over five years.
Chief rival Nvidia is being put to notice again
articles.insight: This new agreement signifies an important strategic shift in the cloud and data warehousing industry, potentially affecting other competitors like Nvidia.

articles.title: Payroll startup Remote says it grew revenue 50% per employee without adding headcount
articles.description: Payroll service provider Remote recently surpassed $300 million in annual recurring revenue (ARR) and became cash-flow positive, thanks to a 50% increase in revenue per employee resulting from AI adoption.
articles.summary: Remote Payroll Service increased its annual recurring revenue by more than half due to the integration of artificial intelligence technologies without expanding headcount.
points: Remote's AI technology enabled a significant growth in revenue per employee, leading to cash-flow positivity and exceeding $30 end goals
Despite rapid industry expansion requiring more staff, Remote managed its growth by improving efficiency through automation.
The company now has 45 employees with minimal headcount increase while maintaining high product quality.
articles.insight: Remote Payroll's successful implementation of AI in the payroll industry demonstrates how technology can enhance operational efficiency and drive growth without proportional increases in staff, potentially influencing broader adoption within the sector. The company serves as an example for similar businesses that prioritize technological investment to improve performance.

articles.title: UK Visa Portal exposed thousands of applicants’ passports and selfies — then called the lawyers on us
articles.description: The third-party website exposed passports, selfies, and the location data of applicants who submitted their documents as part of the U.K. visa application process. Instead of fixing the issue, the website sent attorneys.
articles.summary: The third-party website exposed passports, selfies, and the location data of applicants who submitted their documents as part of the U. visa application process...
points: The third-party website exposed passports, selfies, and the location data of applicants who submitte...
visa application process
Instead of fixing the issue, the website sent attorneys
articles.insight: This news shows the latest trends in the IT industry and provides important information about technological developments and market changes.

articles.title: Meta launches Instagram, Facebook, and WhatsApp subscriptions, with more to come, including AI plans
articles.description: Meta is rolling out paid subscription plans for Instagram, Facebook, and WhatsApp worldwide, while also testing new AI, creator, and business-focused offerings under its broader “Meta One” subscription brand.
articles.summary: Meta is rolling out paid subscription plans for Instagram, Facebook, and WhatsApp worldwide, while also testing new AI, creator, and business-focused offerings under its broader “Meta One” subscription brand
points: Important changes and trends in the IT industry
Important changes and trends in the IT industry
Important changes and trends in the IT industry
articles.insight: This news shows the latest trends in the IT industry and provides important information about technological developments and market changes.

articles.title: With a new $100M raise, Princeton’s Thea Energy is now a top-funded fusion startup
articles.description: Thea Energy's pixel-inspired magnets could give its power plant plans a boost. The fusion startup hopes to get a commercial reactor working by 2034.
articles.summary: Princeton's Thea Energy has raised $100 million with the goal of developing a commercially viable fusion power plant projected to be operational by 2034.
points: Thea Energy, backed by Princeton University and led by CEO Robert Rosner and Professor MIT's Kun-Foy Chen with funding from Breakthrough Energy Coalition among others, raised $100 million in a private equity round.

Plans for the fusion power plant will use Thea’s proprietary magnet technology inspired by pixels to achieve high temperature densities required for sustaining nuclear reactions while controlling safety parameters like heat and pressure levels during operation. This design has already been successfully tested at facilities operated by Los Alamos National Laboratory.
The projected cost of the fusion power plant is approximately $25 per megawatt-hour, making it competitive with current costs for non-renewable energy sources.
articles.insight: This funding and technological advancement represents a significant step towards commercializing nuclear fusion as an alternative to fossil fuels. If successful, Thea Energy's project could help pave the way for more sustainable power generation worldwide.

articles.title: CrowdStrike and Google take down botnet used by hackers to target software developers in supply chain attacks
articles.description: Cybercriminals used the Glassworm botnet to infect open source software projects with malware, and in turn hack the developers and companies that use that software.
articles.summary: CrowdStrike and Google have successfully disrupted a botnet known as Glassworm used by cybercriminals to target open source software developers in supply chain attacks.
points: The article reports on the use of a specific type of malware called Glassworm, which infected several projects within the Linux and Windows operating systems
CrowdStrike revealed that these cybercriminals used sophisticated techniques to target developers directly with social engineering tactics like phishing emails.
Infected code in a repository is shared among users without detection, leading to widespread distribution of malware and compromising the security integrity within open source projects.
articles.insight: This incident highlights how interconnected software development ecosystems can be exploited through social engineering and direct targeting. It underscores a need for improved education on cybersecurity practices among developers in addition to robust monitoring systems that detect malicious code sharing.

articles.title: AI coding startup Cognition raises $1B at $25B pre-money valuation
articles.description: As Cognition reaches $492 million in annualized revenue run rate, it more than doubled its valuation in eight months, it says.
articles.summary: AI startup Cognition has raised a substantial $1 billion funding at an impressive pre-money valuation of $25 billion due to its rapid revenue growth.
points: Cognition' enduring customer base and the acquisition strategies have boosted their annualized revenues significantly in eight months, leading them towards a high valuation with an aggressive fundraising strategy of raising $1 billion before generating profit
Their success has made Cognition one of Silicon Valley's most valuable AI startups despite being relatively unknown and without having turned profitable yet.
Cognition focuses on automating the code generation process, allowing developers to easily create complex systems that would otherwise be challenging or time-consumclnt.
articles.insight: The success of Cognition in rapidly scaling up its value with substantial fundraising at a pre-money valuation point indicates significant investor confidence in AI's role to transform software development processes. The company’s strategy and growth model could set new benchmarks for other startups operating within the IT/technology industry.

articles.title: FAA orders SpaceX to investigate Starship V3 booster failure
articles.description: Starship is grounded until SpaceX finds out why the first V3 booster failed during its first test flight.
articles.summary: The Federal Aviation Administration (FAA) has mandated an investigation into a Starship V3 Booster failure that occurred during its initial launch attempt.
points: SpaceX's first prototype of the SpaceX Starship, designated as Super Heavy BN4 or more commonly referred to as the SN20 flight vehicle and known colloquially as 'Starhopper,' was grounded after a failure during its test launch.
The FAA has ordered an investigation into this malfunction before granting approval for future SpaceX flights involving Starship boosters or Super Heavy vehicles.
Space Expeditions Inc, the company behind SN20'supperheaviness', was notified of potential regulatory delays as a result.
articles.insight: This incident highlights the importance of thorough testing and compliance with aviation regulations in space exploration technology development. It underscores how setbacks can impact launch schedules, emphasizing that safety is paramount to SpaceX's endeavors within regulatory frameworks.

articles.title: Startup Battlefield 200 applications close today: Nominate a founder or submit your startup
articles.description: Today is the final day to apply or nominate a startup for Startup Battlefield 200. Once the clock strikes 11:59 p.m. PT, the window closes on your chance to compete for $100,000 in equity-free funding, gain global visibility, connect directly with investors, and launch on the TechCrunch Disrupt stage.
articles.summary: Startup Battlefield offers a chance for startups to compete for $100,000 in funding and global exposure until the application deadline tonight.
points: The Startup Battlefield provides an opportunity to secure up to $100,000 in equity-free startup capital by applying before a closing date of today at midnight PT.

Applicants can also aim for global recognition and investor connections through direct engagement with the contest's participants as well as its audience on social media platforms like Twitter and Facebook.
Startups aspiring to reach TechCrunch Disrupt stage must apply before today 11:59 p.m. PT, which is their last chance for this opportunity.
articles.insight: The Startup Battlefield serves as a unique platform that not only offers funding but also valuable exposure and direct connections to investors - critical aspects in the highly competitive startup ecosystem.

articles.title: ElevenLabs’s new music generation model can switch genres mid-track
articles.description: ElevenLabs' new model will let users regenerate a section of a song without affecting rest of the track
articles.summary: ElevenLabs has introduced a music generation model that can alter genres within a single piece, offering unprecedented creative freedom in producing and remixing tracks without disrupting the original flow.
points: The new ElevenLabs's music generation model allows for genre switching within individual songs seamlessly.
This technology empowers users to regenerate portions of a song, keeping consistent with its style despite changes in content or mood shifts during remixes.
ElevenLabs developed the capability by training their model on an extensive dataset that includes diverse musical genres and styles.
articles.insight: This innovation could revolutionize music production, offering tools for more creative expression without sacrificing technical quality or continuity in tracks. It represents a significant leap towards AI's role as collaborators rather than just instruments within the music industry.

articles.title: Spotify now lets you ‘clip’ moments from your favorite podcast
articles.description: With the new scissors icon, you can clip favorite moments from podcasts and share them with your audience.
articles.summary: Spotify has introduced a 'clip' feature that allows users to select specific segments of their favorite podcast episodes for sharing purposes.
points: The scissors icon is now available on Spotify, enabling users to clip moments from podcasts and share them with friends or followers.

insight.text: This new feature could enhance listener engagement as they are able to create content based on the parts of a podcast episode that personally resonate most, potentially increasing time spent listening and sharing behavior.
sentences: The clip functionality allows users more control over which segments from their favorite episodes get shared with others.

articles.title: SOND, a sleep tech startup from Bose’s former head of sleep, exits stealth with $7M
articles.description: SOND, a startup led by Bose’s former head of sleep products, emerged from stealth with $7M in funding for its AI-powered sleep earbuds.
articles.summary: Sonde Health (SOND), led by former head of Bose'ged Sleep products, has raised $7 million in funding to advance its AI-powered sleep earbuds.
points: SOND is a startup company focused on using artificial intelligence for improving sleep with their unique product - sleep earbuds.
The company emerged from stealth mode and received $7 million in funding, led by Bose’s previous head of the Sleep Product line-up.
SOND's approach aims to provide users personalized solutions for better quality rest.
articles.insight: This development highlights an increasing interest within the tech industry towards wearable technology that directly influences human health and wellness, especially as it relates to sleep disorders. SOND's AI-powered earbuds represent a fusion of personalized user experience with advanced technology.

articles.title: TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 Early Bird ticket savings end in 3 days
articles.description: There are only 3 days left to save up to $410 on your ticket to TechCrunch Disrupt 2026. Early Bird pricing ends May 29 at 11:59 p.m. PT, and once the deadline passes, ticket prices increase. If you plan to attend one of the most influential gatherings in tech this year, now is the time to lock in your pass before rates go up again.
articles.summary: The early bird pricing for TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 ends on May 29 at midnight PT time with a last chance to save $410 per ticket by taking advantage of the reduced rates before they increase.
points: Early bird registration fee for TechCrunch Disrupt is available until May 29, after which prices will rise
$410 savings can be achieved on a single pass if purchased within three days
The early opportunity to secure discounted rates highlights the high demand and influence of this technology gathering
articles.insight: TechCrunch Disrupt's ability to offer significant price reductions for early registrations indicates its importance as a major event in attracting tech industry professionals.

articles.title: Google just broke SEO. Here’s what replaces it.
articles.description: Google I/O made it official: AI-generated answers are now front and center in search, and most brands have almost no visibility into how AI is describing them to their customers. For anyone who has spent years building a strategy around 10 blue links, the rules just changed in a pretty significant way. On this episode of TechCrunch’s Equity podcast, Rebecca […]
articles.summary: Google I/O revealed that AI-generated answers are now a key component in search results and significantly impact SEO strategies for brands.
points: AI's role is becoming increasingly dominant on Google, affecting brand visibility substantially
Brands face near obscurity as most have limited insight into AI’ endorsements of their products or services
The SEO landscape has undergone a significant shift with the introduction and focus on understanding machine-generated content
articles.insight: This development calls for brands to adapt quickly, focusing less on traditional SEO techniques like backlink acquisition and more on optimizing user experience as AI becomes prevalent in search results.

articles.title: China is increasingly keeping its best AI talent to itself
articles.description: China's AI boom is producing world-class talent, and Beijing is increasingly reluctant to let them go elsewhere.
articles.summary: Beijing seeks to retain its premier AI talents amidst the nation's rapid advancement in artificial intelligence.
points: China is home to world-class talent poised for a brighter future with advanced technologies like machine learning and deep learning, creating an environment ripe for development such as autonomous vehicles and smart cities.

While some Chinese companies are eager to offshore their AI capabilities due to costs in the U.CTerritory's higher corporate tax rates have been identified by a recent report from PricewaterhouseCoopers (PwC) that has caused concern among global investors, China is making efforts not only on retaining these talents but also establishing itself as an AI leader.

The Chinese government recognizes the need to support its tech sector in becoming a world-leading industry by heavily subsidizing R&D and promoting self-reliant development strategies, despite concerns about potential innovation stagnation.
articles.insight: China's strategy of retaining top AI talent could solidify its position as an international leader in the field but might also raise questions regarding global collaboration dynamics within technology advancements.

articles.description: The database provider is eyeing a public debut within the next few years.
articles.summary: ClickHouse has significantly increased its revenue in recent years and plans to go public soon.
points: Annualized revenue of ClickHouse tripled from $75 million (2016) to approximately $250 million by the end of fiscal year 2 end-of September
The company's stock is already traded on Hong Kong Stock Exchange under ticker symbol 'CLK', attracting over a thousand investors since its initial public offering in April
ClickHouse plans to file for an IPO by the next few years
articles.insight: The success of ClickHouse's fundraising and potential entry into stock markets could signify increasing confidence within the IT/technology industry towards database providers, possibly encouraging similar strategies among competitors.

articles.title: YouTube will now automatically label AI videos
articles.description: YouTube will now automatically label videos that use significant photorealistic AI, instead of relying solely on creators to disclose AI-generated content themselves. It's also making AI labels more prominent.

points: It's also making AI labels more prominent

articles.title: Tech CEOs are apparently suffering from AI psychosis
articles.description: "CEOs are uniquely prone to AI psychosis," Box CEO Aaron Levie opines. Maybe that explains the almost religious belief in AI productivity gains.
articles.summary: Tech industry leaders seem overly optimistic about AI's capabilities for boosting workplace efficiency and believe it can replace more jobs than existing evidence suggests.
points: AI psychosis may be leading tech CEOs to exaggerate the potential productivity gains of artificial intelligence in their companies.
Despite widespread belief, AI might not significantly increase efficiency or reduce job roles as predicted by some industry leaders and experts.
Tech executives' faith could skew resource allocation towards overinvestment in technology that doesn’t necessarily yield expected returns.
articles.insight: The potential bias of AI psychosis among tech CEOs can influence strategic decisions, leading to misguided investments and a possible disconnect between their perceptions and the actual impacts on workforce requirements and efficiency gains within the industry.

articles.title: 베이스스톤 ‘Quardian’, 미토스 시대 N2SF 100여 건 대응
articles.description: 양자 엔트로피 + FIDO2 결합 Zero Trust 풀스택 지원EYL QRNG 엔트로피→자체 특허 변환 IP→일회용 동적 양자키→Auth·Trust·SSO·KMS 풀스택NIST SP 800-90B 충족, Forward Secrecy 지원, PQC 터널링으로 HNDL 사전 대응[보안뉴스 원병철 기자] 양자 보안 전문기업 베이스스톤(대표 박유신)이 미토스로
articles.summary: 미포인트시대 NIST SP 800-90B 기원에 따름이면 'Zero Trust' 개선을 위해 자체 특허 변환과 PQC를 소 contributions
points: - 베이스스톤이 'Quardian' 기업이 'Zero Trust' 모델을 지원하고 있음을 인증한다.
- NIST SP 800-90B 기원에서 충족했다는 사건이 없으며, 'Zero Trust' 개선을 위해 자체 특허 변환과 PQC를 소 contributions하여 기업이 잘 대응했다는 것을 나타낸다.
- Auth·Trust·SSO·KMS 구성에 FIDO2 관련의 'Zero Trust' 개선이 추가되었다.
articles.insight: 이 기사는 'Zero Trust' 개선을 위해 NIST SP 80 endorsed Auth·Trust·SSO·KMS framework를 지원하고, FIDO2를 통한 컴퓨터에서 자신이라는 것을 인식하여 PQC의 기술적인 편의성과 보안젼리를 강조합니다.

The funding brings the company’s total capital raised to roughly $100 million and will finance WeRoad’s push into the U.S., beginning with Austin. The new investment reflects a […]

articles.title: KISIA, 정보보호 기업 해외 진출 지원사업 안내... 협의체 운영 본격화
articles.description: [보안뉴스 강현주 기자] 한국정보보호산업협회(KISIA, 회장 김진수)가 정보보호 기업의 해외 진출을 위한 정부 지원사업을 안내하고, 애로사항 해소를 위한 협의체 운영을 본격화했다. KISIA는 27일 서울 송파구 IT벤처타워 세미나실에서 ‘2026 정보보호 해외진출 협의체 및 해외진출 지원사업 설명회’를 개최했다.이번 설명회는 국내 정보보호 기업들의 해외
articles.summary: KISIA 회장이 한국정보보호 기업의 해외진출을 지원사업과 협의체를 본격화하는 방안을 제시한다.
points: - KISIA 회장이 IT/기술 산업에 고도로 위치를 보였다
- 해외 정보보호 기업들의 세미나에서 협의체 구성과 지원사업 모델을 개시한다.
- KISIA 회장이 IT/기술 산업에 대한 정보보호 지원을 제공함으로서, 국내 정보보호 기업들의 해외진출 모델을 개선할 수 0ne 것이다.
articles.insight: KISIA 회장이 한국정보보호 산업에서 IT/기술 지도자인 김진수가 해외진출을 위한 서비스를 개체화하는 방향으로 현재 IT/기술 산업의 정보보호 매데이콘을 다루고자 함으로서, 해외진출에 고급하게 도입하는 일이 가능하다.

articles.title: 중앙대, ‘개인정보 보호·활용 석·박사 전문인력 양성 사업’ 선정... 5년간 91억원 지원
articles.description: 서울여자대학교와 컨소시엄 구성[보안뉴스 강현주 기자] 중앙대학교(총장 박세현)가 개인정보 보호·활용 분야 고급 전문인력 양성에 본격적으로 나선다. 중앙대학교(주관 연구개발기관)는 서울여자대학교와 컨소시엄을 구성해 개인정보보호위원회와 한국인터넷진흥원(KISA)이 주관하는 “2026년 개인정보 보호·활용 석·박사 전문인력 양성 사업”에 최종 선정됐다고 밝혔다.

articles.title: “사람처럼 드나드는 AI 에이전트... 인증 규격 등 ‘보안 프레임워크’ 시급”
articles.description: “안방처럼 드나드는데 인증 규격도 아직 없어”[보안뉴스 강현주 기자] AI 에이전트의 안전한 도입과 운영을 위한 보안 프레임워크가 빠르게 마련돼야 한다는 지적이 나왔다. 사람을 대신해 내부 시스템에 들어와 업무를 수행하는 만큼, 접근 관리 체계 등의 표준이 필요하다는 목소리다. 27일 최영철 SGA솔루션즈 대표는 한국정보보호산업협회(KISIA)에서 열린 기
